home.upcomingHint: Transactions and debt summaries will appear here in Step 5.

auth.resetPasswordInstructions: Enter the email address for your account and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetLinkSent: If an account exists for {{email}}, a reset link is on its way.
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your finances.
auth.registerSubtitle: It only takes a minute. Your data is end-to-end protected.
auth.confirmEmailNotice: Please check your email for a confirmation link before signing in.
auth.googleNotConfigured: Google sign-in is not configured yet.

contacts.deleteConfirm: Delete this contact permanently? This cannot be undone.
contacts.emptyDescription: Tap + to add your first contact, or pick someone from your phone book.
contacts.emptyPhoneHint: No matches in your phone book.
contacts.permissionExplain: We use your phone book only to help you find people you transact with. Nothing is uploaded to the server until you explicitly save them.
contacts.permissionDenied: You previously denied access. To re-enable, open your device Settings.
contacts.balancePlaceholder: Debt totals will appear here in Step 5.

settings.morePlaceholderHint: Theme, language, and default currency options arrive in Step 6.

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.passwordWeak: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, and a number.

errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.userAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.userNotFound: No account found with that email.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.network: Cannot reach the server. Check your internet connection.
